headline: ceo @ GOOD TRAFFIC //
summary: Entrepreneur who doubled as an investment banker for a while. Currently learning and building GOOD TRAFFIC - utilizing rideshare vehicles to provide a new medium for brands to advertise. We're collecting data to prove OOH ads work, and testing some cool technology to improve attribution down the funnel. www.goodtraffic.com
